title: valantia muralis var. aculeata
intro: Valantia muralis var. aculeata, also known as prickly valerian, is a plant species belonging to the valerian family and is characterized by its thorny stems and distinctive fragrance. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Valantia muralis var. aculeata include its potential to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its ability to soothe muscle spasms and promote relaxation. Valantia muralis var. aculeata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine for its therapeutic properties.
